name: Eastrise
description_short: Vermont-based credit union offering checking, savings, home loans, auto loans, and investment services with competitive APY rates and community-focused banking.
description_long:
EastRise Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union that has operated in Vermont for 75 years. As an NCUA-insured institution, it serves individuals and businesses in its community with full-service financial offerings. The credit union positions itself as a 'small-town credit union with big-bank capabilities,' emphasizing local roots while delivering modern banking technology including mobile banking apps and online account opening.

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates with competitive APY rates (currently 3.60% APY for 7-month terms), money market accounts (up to 4.50% APY), home loans (6.036% APR for 30-year fixed), auto loans (as low as 4.85% APR), business banking, and investment advisory services. Their flagship product is the EastRise Checking Plus account, which earns 3.50% APY on the first $15,000 with no minimum balance or monthly maintenance fees.

EastRise differentiates itself through four core pillars: local community presence and 75-year history in Vermont, people-first service philosophy prioritizing relationship-building over transactions, commitment to operational excellence and attention to detail, and sustainability focus balancing financial growth with environmental protection. The credit union emphasizes personalized financial counseling, free one-on-one financial counseling sessions, and an extensive blog resource library with 400+ articles on financial management.

As a credit union, EastRise offers the standard advantages of member ownership and non-profit structure, including NCUA insurance protection on deposits. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility requirements, field of membership restrictions, branch locations, or specific loan approval criteria. Geographic service area appears focused on Vermont, which may limit accessibility for out-of-state members.
services: Personal checking accounts (Checking Plus product with 3.50% APY)
Personal savings accounts and deposit products
Certificates of Deposit (currently 3.60% APY for 7-month terms)
Investment advisory and wealth management services
Free financial counseling and one-on-one advisory sessions
pros: Checking Plus account earns 3.50% APY on first $15,000 with no minimum balance and no monthly fees
Certificate of Deposit offering 3.60% APY for 7-month terms at competitive rates
Money Market accounts up to 4.50% APY for savings growth
Free financial counseling sessions with certified advisors
Mobile banking app for convenient account management
Auto loans as low as 4.85% APR
75-year operating history demonstrating stability and local commitment
cons: Website does not clearly specify field of membership or eligibility requirements for opening accounts
Geographic focus appears limited to Vermont with no mention of national or multi-state service areas
Specific loan approval criteria, credit score requirements, and underwriting standards not disclosed on website
No information provided about branch locations or service hours
Limited details on business loan products and terms compared to personal products
best_for: Vermont residents seeking local, relationship-based banking with competitive savings rates
Individuals prioritizing high-yield checking accounts without maintenance fees or minimum balances
Small business owners and entrepreneurs in the EastRise service area needing community-focused business banking
Customers valuing sustainability initiatives and environmental consciousness in their financial institution
diagnosis: EastRise Credit Union is best for Vermont-based consumers and small business owners seeking relationship-focused, local banking with competitive rates on checking and savings products. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and geographic service area are not clearly defined on the website, so prospective members should verify they meet field of membership requirements before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Eastrise — Credit Union in Williston, VT | CreditDoc
meta_description: Eastrise — NCUA-insured credit union in Williston, VT. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
